title: 今晚凌晨會唔會玩大咗 出解放軍戒嚴？

replies.msg:
郭文貴已經透露最快今晚凌晨1點戒嚴。
旺角、尖沙咀、紅隧、黃大仙。。。會唔會真係玩大咗有藉口畀 木木奠⻖要求解放軍戒嚴？
使唔使而家 be water 散水先，下次再見？

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OjrOGbsFPlE

一．共产党：将在8月4号（4号凌晨1點或5号到6号晚上的凌晨1點）宣布根据解放军驻港法．国家安全法．由香港政府申请·驻港部队对香港戒严。
The communist party: will announce on August 4th that base upon the PLA Garrison Law and National security laws, the Hong Kong government has requested martial law be enforced by the PLA army stationed in Hong Kong.

二．戒严条例将规定．对香港．社会治安．人员进出由戒严指挥部统一指挥。
2. The safety of Hong Kong, public order and the entry and exit of personnel shall all be under the unified direction of the martial law command.

三．戒严指挥部将对香港的人员进出大规模限制，基本上是只许出不许进，并将定向清理美国和欧洲国家在香港的驻港机构人员及特别是美英的外籍人士。
3. The martial law command will impose massive restrictions on the movement of people in and out of Hong Kong, essentially barring them from entering but allowing them to leave the territory freely. They will also clean up U.S. and European institutions based in Hong Kong and foreigners especially with U.S. and British passports.

四．驻港部队实施戒严的同时，（香港警察）将对6月9日以来上街抗议的積極人士（暴动份子，可能是1万个）进行大抓捕。
4. (The Hong Kong police) will make many (maybe 10,000) arrests associated with the active protests which have occurred since June 9, as troops stationed in Hong Kong impose martial law.
